themes.label: Fear/Anxiety

themes.label: Obedience

themes.label: Holiness
themes.summary: This chapter focuses on holiness, righteousness, purity, consecration, or being set apart. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Cross references echo "Righteousness". Word-study detail reinforces "הַצַּדִּ֔יק: is righteous - just".
